recommendations.title: The Influence
recommendations.overview: After moving back to her family home to care for her dying mother, a nurse haunted by her childhood memories must struggle with an evil force in the house.

recommendations.title: Black Rock
recommendations.overview: Three childhood friends set aside their personal issues and reunite for a girls’ weekend on a remote island off the coast of Maine. One wrong move turns their weekend getaway into a deadly fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer
recommendations.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: Dad
recommendations.overview: A busy executive learns during a meeting that his mother may be dying and rushes home to her side. He ends up being his father's caretaker and becomes closer to him than ever before. Estranged from his own son, the executive comes to realize what has

recommendations.title: Evil Dead Rise
recommendations.overview: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: Blue Ruin
recommendations.overview: When the quiet life of a beach bum is upended by dreadful news, he sets off for his childhood home to carry out an act of vengeance. However, he proves an inept assassin and finds himself in a brutal fight to protect his estranged family.

recommendations.title: When the Bough Breaks
recommendations.overview: A surrogate mother harbors a deadly secret desire for a family of her own with the husband who is expecting to raise her child.

recommendations.title: Breathe
recommendations.overview: Air-supply is scarce in the near future, forcing a mother and daughter to fight for survival when two strangers arrive desperate for an oxygenated haven.

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.
